# Design: MVE Line Duration & Timeline Width (Slice 1 — Audio)

<!-- generated by /implement 2026-06-26 from pingpong exploration -->

## Problem & Intent

MVE text blocks span the full scene width instead of content duration. Users expect WPM-based width without audio (like book/clip T29) and exact media duration with audio. For **audio (Hörspiel) projects**, the scene container should follow content (grow and shrink). Film uses `structureDriven` policy in Slice 2 (deferred).

## Non-Goals

- No `DEFAULT_FRAME_RATE = 1000` ms-tick refactor
- Film DAW lanes + `structureDriven` (Slice 2)
- Free placement (`MveLine.startSec`) — sequential stacking only
- Book project timeline changes

## Assumptions

1. Audio clips remain ms-accurate (`durationMs/1000`); structure quantizes to 30 fps.
2. Text-only lines render in `MveTextBlockLaneItems`; bound lines render as `AudioTimelineSegment`.
3. `contentDriven` applies when `projectType === "audio"`.
4. Multiple lines in one scene stack sequentially by `orderIndex`.

## Options Considered

### Option A: YAGNI — visual width only
Rejected — scene/container mismatch.

### Option B: CapCut hybrid + contentDriven (recommended, Slice 1)
`resolveMveLineSpan` + `resizeSceneForContent` for audio projects.

### Option C: ms ticks everywhere
Rejected — large refactor, low UX gain.

## Decision

**Option B** for Slice 1 (`audio` only). Film in Slice 2.

## Cross-Domain Sign-Off

| Domain | Status |
|--------|--------|
| KISS | ✅ |
| SOLID | ✅ |
| DRY | ✅ reuses `estimateDurationSec`, ripple |
| Security | ✅ |
| UI/UX | ✅ |
| Scaling | ⚠️ ripple on many scenes |
| Testability | ✅ pure span + policy |
| Maintainability | ✅ |

## Implementation Sketch

```
src/lib/mve/resolve-mve-line-span.ts
src/lib/mve/scene-duration-policy.ts
src/lib/mve/sync-scene-duration-for-mve-content.ts
src/lib/structure/resize-scene-for-content.ts
src/hooks/useMveTextBlockLaneDrop.ts — delegate timing
src/components/audio/AudioTimelineMveTextBlock.tsx
src/components/timeline/audio/MveTextBlockLaneItems.tsx
src/hooks/useMveLines.ts — post-save sync
src/hooks/useMveTextBlockAudioClip.ts — resizeSceneForContent
```

## Ready for /implement

YES (Slice 1)
